description_long: This is a set of three brown cardboard storage boxes, each sealed with yellow tape marked with the Playtime Co. logo. The largest box features a colorful illustration of a red-haired cartoon character with blue bows, along with the words 'playtime co.' and 'Large' on a green label. The boxes have visible seams and tape strips on the top and sides, suggesting they are securely closed. The sides of the boxes are plain except for colored bands at the base—red, blue, and green—likely for size or content identification. The boxes appear lightweight and are designed for easy stacking or transport, making them suitable for storage or shipping in urban environments.
description: A set of three brown cardboard storage boxes with yellow Playtime Co. tape, colorful size labels, and a cartoon character illustration on the largest box.
description_view_0: Front view showing the largest box with a cartoon character, Playtime Co. branding, and a green 'Large' label.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain brown surfaces of all three boxes and the yellow tape sealing the tops.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the colored bands (red, blue, green) at the base of each box and the taped tops.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain brown sides and the arrangement of the three boxes in a row.
attribute_lid_type: removable flat lid sealed with tape
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed label area, cartoon illustration, colored size bands
